diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thanks for calling Genshin Impact Player Support, this is Taylor. How can I help?
[Caller] I hit pity on the character banner and I got Keqing instead of Arlecchino. That's a standard 5-star, not the featured one. I lost my 50/50 and I'm really upset.
[Agent] Oh, the 50/50 sting is real — I'm sorry, that's genuinely one of the most painful outcomes in the game. Let me pull your account and walk through where you are, because the news is actually much better than it feels right now. UID please?
[Caller] 704582103.
[Agent] Thanks, Sofia. Confirmed — AR55, Europe, and yes I see the Keqing pull on the Arlecchino banner. Here's the key thing about the 50/50 system that every player should know: the loss isn't random forever. Because you lost this 50/50, your next 5-star on any character event banner is 100% guaranteed to be the featured character. No coin flip, no chance, guaranteed.
[Caller] Wait, so the next 5-star is definitely Arlecchino?
[Agent] Definitely. As long as she's still the featured 5-star when you pull it. That status is called 'guaranteed' and it carries over between banners too. If Arlecchino's banner ends before you pull her, the guarantee applies to whoever is featured next — and when Arlecchino reruns, the guarantee is still yours.
[Caller] Oh. That's actually... a huge relief.
[Agent] Right? The 50/50 feels like pure loss in the moment, but structurally it's a ticket you cash in next time. Let me also check your pity — you're now at pull 0 since you got a 5-star, so you're starting fresh with a guarantee locked in. If you want Arlecchino on this banner, save enough primogems for up to 90 more pulls to be safe, though soft pity usually resolves around 75 to 80.
[Caller] That's much more manageable than I thought.
[Agent] I'll also send you a short email explaining the 50/50, guarantee, and pity carryover rules — handy to keep for future banners. Anything else?
[Caller] No, honestly this completely changed my mood. Thank you so much Taylor.
[Agent] You're very welcome, Sofia. Go get Arlecchino — she's waiting. Have a great day!
